_comment: NO AGENT JOBS REMAIN. Every Hermes cron is now a `--no-agent --script` job created
on the box directly (source under ../scripts/), NOT recorded in this file. The weekly
newsletter was the LAST agent job; it moved to the hybrid `fluncle-newsletter` sweep
(newsletter-sweep.{sh,ts}) on 2026-06-27 after an agent run flailed 83 model calls /
~$9.61 of OpenRouter credit on a single trigger (it hand-rolled the CLI shell, and once
the empty-edition guard started rejecting its hollow drafts it retried into a storm with
no iteration cap). The sweep is deterministic except ONE bounded `claude -p` authoring
call (subscription auth, zero OpenRouter tokens) — one call, not 83.
This file is kept as the cron MECHANISM record + the source-of-truth pointer; the repo
is canonical and the box is a deploy target (fluncle-hermes-operator skill). It is empty
of jobs by design now.
THE SWEEPS (all `--no-agent`, created on the box via `hermes cron create`, see ./README.md;
source under ../scripts/): fluncle-enrich (5m), fluncle-context-note (5m), fluncle-note
(10m, hybrid), fluncle-backfill (30m), fluncle-observation (60m, hybrid), fluncle-render
(60m, video conductor), fluncle-social-capture (10m), fluncle-studio-clip (15m,
ffmpeg cut), fluncle-newsletter (`0 15 * * 5`, hybrid). A pure
trigger ships deterministic stdout; a HYBRID (note/observation/newsletter) wraps ONE
`claude -p` authoring call in a deterministic gather/persist/deliver shell.
MECHANISM (https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/features/cron):
- jobs live in ~/.hermes/cron/jobs.json; per-run output under ~/.hermes/cron/output/{job_id}/.
- the gateway ticks every 60s and runs due jobs; a `--no-agent` job is KILLED at 120s, so
the newsletter sweep authors WITHOUT in-call file tools (the voice canon is inline in the
prompt) — a real run measures ~42s, well inside budget; a skill-reading variant ran ~2m12s.
- schedule: relative one-shot / interval / cron expr / ISO. The newsletter uses `0 15 * * 5`.
TIMEZONE (newsletter): Hermes cron has no per-job tz — `0 15 * * 5` is 15:00 in the BOX
CLOCK's zone. The box is pinned TZ=Europe/Amsterdam so it is always 15:00 Amsterdam across
the CET/CEST flip, with zero app-level DST logic.
SEND GATE (newsletter): the send stays OPERATOR-gated. The sweep DRAFTS (admin tier — the
box's agent token can draft; it gets a 403 on send) then delivers a one-line Discord summary
+ the exact `fluncle admin newsletter send <id>` command (operator tier). The old interactive
`clarify` Send button needed the agent/gateway and is gone with the agent loop; the operator
runs the send command. Silence is never consent — nothing auto-sends; an un-sent draft is
re-offered by the next Friday run (the sweep's miss-recovery step).
